spotlight.headline: 11-dimensional codebase cleanup with confidence scoring and build verification gates.
spotlight.whyKiller: Born from a real cleanup session — 25,000 lines removed, 4 bugs caught — packaged into a reusable plugin. 11 specialized agents scan for dead code, AI slop, weak types, security vulnerabilities, N+1 queries, floating promises, circular deps, and more. Every finding gets a confidence score (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW). LOW-risk dimensions auto-apply after build verification. HIGH-risk dimensions flag only — never touch your code without proof. One command, full codebase hygiene.
spotlight.author: Jeremy Longshore
spotlight.quote: 8 parallel agents, 25K lines removed, 4 bugs found. Now it's a plugin anyone can run.

hallOfFame.headline: Ghost tokens eat your context. Find them. Fix them. Prevent rot.
hallOfFame.author: Alex Greenshpun
hallOfFame.quote: My Claude Code kept leaking tokens. So I built this. Now my limits last longer, context stays fresh, and I have full visibility and control over my usage & setup.

hallOfFame.whyKiller: Research meeting attendees, gather email history, create meeting briefs, and manage action items via Todoist — the complete EA workflow automated by Auth0's former VP of Marketing/Growth.
hallOfFame.author: Martin Gontovnikas
hallOfFame.quote: These skills fully replaced my human executive assistant.
